commands_run: rg -n "set \\+e|SYNC_RC=\\$\\?|grep -qiE 'lockfile\\.\\*needs to be updated'|Lockfile drift detected|uv sync complete via auto-heal|output did not match lockfile-drift marker|rm -f \"\\$SYNC_OUTPUT\"|\"\\$UV_BIN\" lock --python 3.10|\"\\$UV_BIN\" sync --python 3.10 --extra cuda124" gpu_orchestrator/runpod/worker_startup.template.sh

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
s = Path('gpu_orchestrator/runpod/worker_startup.template.sh').read_text()
checks = {
    'set +e': 'set +e' in s,
    'SYNC_RC=$?': 'SYNC_RC=$?' in s,
    'set -e': 'set -e' in s,
    'drift grep': "grep -qiE 'lockfile.*needs to be updated'" in s,
    'uv lock': '"$UV_BIN" lock --python 3.10' in s,
    'recovery sync unlocked': '"$UV_BIN" sync --python 3.10 --extra cuda124' in s,
    'locked sync preserved': '"$UV_BIN" sync --locked --python 3.10 --extra cuda124' in s,
    'post-heal recompute': 'UV_LOCK_SHA256="$(sha256sum uv.lock | awk \'{print $1}\')"' in s,
    'warning': 'Lockfile drift detected' in s,
    'post-heal success': 'uv sync complete via auto-heal' in s,
    'non-drift abort': 'output did not match lockfile-drift marker' in s,
}
for k, v in checks.items():
    print(f'{k}: {v}')
print('rm sync output count:', s.count('rm -f "$SYNC_OUTPUT"'))
print('sentinel write count:', s.count('printf \'%s\\n\' "$EXPECTED_INPUTS_HASH" > "$SYNC_SENTINEL"'))
PY
